ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the financial instrument operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the financial instrument operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry */,
  "ema20" REAL /* 20-day Exponential Moving Average */,
  "ema50" REAL /* 50-day Exponential Moving Average */,
  "ema100" REAL /* 100-day Exponential Moving Average */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index */,
  "macdh" REAL /* MACD Histogram */,
  "cci" REAL /* Commodity Channel Index */,
  "wmr" REAL /* Williams %R */,
  "obv" REAL /* On-Balance Volume */,
  "trix" REAL /* TRIX */,
  "atr" REAL /* Average True Range */,
  "force_index" REAL /* Force Index */,
  "acc_dis" REAL /* Accumulation/Distribution */,
  "aaron" INTEGER /* Aaron Indicator */,
  "timeseries" REAL /* Time Series Value */,
  "bollinger_bands_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_bands_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  "stochastic_oscillator_k" REAL /* Stochastic Oscillator %K */,
  "stochastic_oscillator_d" REAL /* Stochastic Oscillator %D */,
  "pivot_points" TEXT /* Pivot points for support and resistance levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_instruments" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-instrument follow entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the instrument */,
  "note" TEXT /* User's personal note about the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, indicator) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or inactive) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., once, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout configuration of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* List of widgets on the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dashboard is shared with other users */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs to whom the dashboard is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Transaction fees */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or categories of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the instrument */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment score (e.g., news, social media) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
